data.title: Think Together Hosts Third Annual "Think Together, Build Together" Volunteer Event to Support Summer Learning for Students Across California
data.description: A recent event in Santa Ana, California saw Think Together, a division of Think Education, putting together 2,000 classroom kits for summer learning experiences. The third annual Think Together, Build Together kit build event gathered donors and contributors to make this initiative possible.

data.title: San Diego County Credit Union Announces San Diego Superior Court Has Denied California Coast Credit Union's Motion for Preliminary Injunction to Compel Merger
data.description: On May 1, 2026, San Diego County Credit Union (SDCCU), a major locally-owned financial institution in Southern California, released a statement in response to the San Diego Superior Court's ruling denying California Coast Credit Union's appeal. SDCCU emphasized their commitment to providing reliable financial services to the community. This development follows a legal dispute involving significant assets and market share between the two credit unions in the region. The decision by the court underscores the competitive landscape and regulatory framework within the financial sector, impacting thousands of members associated with both institutions.

data.title: Asian American Engineer of the Year Award and Conference Announces First Phase of 2025-2026 Awardees
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, on May 1, 2026, the AAEOY Executive Committee disclosed the initial phase awardees for the AAEOY 2025-2026. This includes the Distinguished Lifetime Achievement Award presented to Mr. Lip-Bu Tan, the CEO of Intel Corporation.

data.title: Mission Valley Bancorp Reports First Quarter Results
data.description: Sun Valley, California-based Mission Valley Bancorp (OTCQX: MVLY) reported a net income of $0.7 million, equivalent to $0.21 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2026. This is a decrease from the previous year's first quarter net income of $1.6 million, or $0.47 per diluted share. The Company's financial results for this quarter reflect a significant decline in profitability.

data.title: Pink Bows Foundation Partners With Makeup Junkie Bags on Limited-Edition Collection Honoring Madison Dubiski
data.description: The Pink Bows Foundation recently launched a collection featuring both women's and men's lines. This nonprofit organization, created by the family of an Astroworld victim, aims to enhance crowd safety at live events. Fifty percent of proceeds from the collection will be contributed towards crowd safety education and event safety training efforts. The foundation's initiative is focused on making events safer, with the support of the community and commitment to ensuring safer event experiences. The collection will not only promote style and fashion but also contribute significantly to boosting crowd safety awareness. The foundation's dedication to this cause is evident in their collaboration with various partners and sponsors, emphasizing the importance of creating a safer environment for all attendees.

data.title: The 28th China Beijing International High-Tech Expo Grand Opening Soon
data.description: From May 8 to 10, 2026, the 28th China Beijing International High-Tech Expo (CHITEC) will take place at the China National Convention Center. The event aims to showcase technological advancements and foster innovation. This highlights the growing importance of technology in shaping the future. According to a report from CCTV.com, the expo will attract a large audience, with an expected attendance of thousands of individuals. This demonstrates the widespread interest and impact of high-tech developments. The expo serves as a platform for companies and organizations to present their latest products and services, further driving progress in the tech industry.

data.title: US Startup PerZeption Inc. Announces Collaboration with Alcon Research
data.description: In Boston, Massachusetts, on May 1, 2026, PerZeption will be showcasing groundbreaking advancements in vision correction assessment. The company's latest data demonstrates the effectiveness of its AIM+ CSF technology in accurately and quickly identifying significant visual discrepancies. This innovation provides a precise and efficient solution to detecting clinical variations in vision.

data.title: Avicanna Announces Change in Board of Directors
data.description: Avicanna Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in plant-derived cannabinoid-based products, has announced that Eileen McCormack, a board member, has resigned from her position ahead of the upcoming annual general and special meeting of shareholders on May 7, 2026. McCormack, who was not slated for re-election or election as outlined in the circular, departed on May 1, 2026. Avicanna trades on the TSX under the ticker symbol AVCN, on the OTCQX as AVCNF, and on the FSE as 0NN.

data.title: MOREH Demonstrates Production-Ready LLM Inference on Tenstorrent Galaxy, Achieving DGX A100-Class Performance with Improved Cost Efficiency
data.description: Reducing costs associated with HBM, Moreh, an AI infrastructure software company led by CEO Gangwon Jo, introduced TT-Deploy at Tenstorrent's launch event in San Francisco on May 1, 2026. TT-Deploy promises a drastic cut in expenses with GPU-Tenstorrent Heterogeneous Distributed Serving. The innovation aims to optimize operations and minimize financial burdens for companies dealing with AI infrastructure. This move indicates a strategic shift towards cost efficiency and improved performance in the tech industry.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Applied Intuition, Inc./
data.description: Applied Intuition has partnered with Heidelberg Materials to enhance innovation in quarry operations through autonomous haulage fleets. The collaboration was announced on April 30, 2026. Key details of the partnership include developing advanced technologies for autonomous fleet management. The initiative aims to drive efficiency and safety in quarry operations by utilizing cutting-edge automation solutions. This collaboration is set to revolutionize the industry by introducing state-of-the-art systems, with a significant focus on enhancing operational productivity and reducing risks in quarry environments.

data.title: Gray Media and Byron Allen’s Allen Media Group Closed Station Transactions
data.description: Today, Gray Media, Inc. and Allen Media Group, Inc. finalized their previously disclosed deals for a combined total of $171 million, plus adjustments for working capital. On March 26, 2026, Gray purchased stations in three fresh markets, while today they acquired stations in the remaining seven overlapping markets.

data.title: WESTSHORE TERMINALS FILES 2026 FIRST QUARTER REPORT AND ANNOUNCES 2026 SECOND QUARTER DIVIDEND
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 1, 2026, Westshore Terminals Investment Corporation (TSX: WTE) disclosed its financial results for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The corporation has officially submitted its earnings report along with the management's discussion and analysis. Further details are provided in the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Faircourt Gold Income Corp. Announces Net Asset Value for Annual Redemption of Class A Shares
data.description: In Toronto on May 01, 2026, Faircourt Asset Management Inc., the Manager of Faircourt Gold Income Corp., has released an update. Securityholders who submitted their Class A Shares for redemption on March 31, 2026, will receive $7.6504 per Class A Share. This amount is based on the Net Asset Value per Share, determined using a five-day volume-weighted average price of exchange-traded equity securities held by the Company until April 29, 2026, minus a pro rata share of all brokerage fees, commissions, and other related costs associated with selling portfolio securities for the redemption. Payments will be processed in full by May 21, 2026.
Trump: Germany has not adhered to our trade deal. EU has not adhered to trade deal with the US.

data.title: Newcore Gold Files Technical Report for the Updated Mineral Resource Estimate for the Enchi Gold Project, Ghana
data.description: Newcore Gold Ltd. has disclosed the filing of the technical report backing the updated Mineral Resource Estimate for the Enchi Gold Project in Ghana, in compliance with NI 43-101 standards. The report was completed by DRA Americas Inc. of Toronto, Ontario, Canada. The Mineral Resource Estimate update can be accessed on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca. Newcore Gold Ltd. is listed on the TSX-V as NCAU and on the OTCQX as NCAUF.

data.title: Saks Global Receives Disclosure Statement Approval, Advancing Toward Confirmation and Emergence
data.description: Luxury retailer Saks Global Enterprises LLC is set to proceed with voting on its revised Plan of Reorganization, which has garnered broad support. The company remains on schedule to complete its restructuring this summer, positioning it for sustainable growth in the future. The vote solicitation process is about to begin, marking a crucial step for the company as it aims to finalize its plans. The amended reorganization strategy has received significant backing and is paving the way for a successful emergence post-restructuring. This development signifies a significant milestone for Saks Global as it navigates its way towards a more robust and resilient operational framework.

data.title: R3 Ventures Joins Forbright Bank on Chase Tower Acquisition in Chevy Chase, Maryland
data.description: R3 Ventures, a real estate investment, development, and advisory firm based in Washington, D.C., has been chosen by Forbright Bank to provide specialized asset management services for their recent strategic acquisition of a headquarters in Chevy Chase, Maryland. The announcement was made on May 1, 2026. This partnership signifies a significant step for Forbright Bank, underscoring their commitment to optimal asset management practices.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Set More Record Highs; Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, Alphabet Are Big Winners
data.description: The Nasdaq and S&P 500 reached new record highs on Monday, with Dow Jones Futures showing positive trends. Leading the gains were technology companies Micron, Sandisk, Nvidia, and Alphabet. This surge in performance is indicative of the market's strength, with investors closely monitoring these developments. The overall upward momentum in these indices reflects a positive sentiment among market participants, highlighting the success of these particular tech companies.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips But Nasdaq, Nvidia Gain; Microsoft Up After This OpenAI Deal (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline, while Google's parent company Alphabet debuted on the stock market. Microsoft saw an increase following a recent partnership with OpenAI. The Nasdaq and Nvidia reported gains. Overall, the stock market showed mixed results, with specific attention to Microsoft's positive movement and Alphabet's market entry. This information was presented as live coverage and was not sourced from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: GameStop Gears Up For EBay Takeover Offer: WSJ
data.description: According to a report from the Wall Street Journal on Friday, GameStop is getting ready to make a bid to acquire the e-commerce powerhouse eBay. Following this news, GameStop's stock saw an increase in after-hours trading, while eBay's stock price experienced a significant surge. This potential takeover offer has generated buzz in the investment community and was covered by Investor's Business Daily.
